🧠 The Survival Node AI Agent

A custom-configured "Survival Node" AI agent is pre-loaded and tuned for survival advice and safety-first responses. Ask it anything — medical, tactical, navigation, shelter, food — and get expert-level answers with no internet required. Three local Large Language Models provide built-in redundancy so you always have a backup when it matters most.

The included high-capacity solar battery keeps your Survival Node phone powered through extended grid-down scenarios — with multiple cable types included for all your devices.
